title: Item Feature/App shows as blank but only in context
excerpt: I have a small JS page hosted on my own website that I have used to make an Item Feature. It works great in the feature “View Setup” page but when I actually install in on my board the title comes up but it’s blank. This…

posts.author: Domajo (Doug)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a small JS page hosted on my own website that I have used to make an Item Feature. It works great in the feature “View Setup” page but when I actually install in on my board the title comes up but it’s blank. This is my first MDC app so it’s probably something trivial I don’t understand about the process. I have spent a few hours trying to understand this, re-reading the documentation, etc.

-Doug

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Domajo I believe we are talking via email. Correct?

If so, let’s continue the flow over there
